00017 #ifndef FFPLUGININFO_STANDARD
00018 #define FFPLUGININFO_STANDARD
00019 
00020 
00021 #include "FreeFrame.h"
00022 
00023 
00024 typedef DWORD __stdcall FPCREATEINSTANCE(void**);
00025 
00026 
00045 
00046 class CFFPluginInfo {
00047 
00048 public:
00049 
00086         CFFPluginInfo(
00087                 FPCREATEINSTANCE* pCreateInstance,
00088                 const char* pchUniqueID,
00089                 const char* pchPluginName,
00090                 DWORD dwAPIMajorVersion,
00091                 DWORD dwAPIMinorVersion,
00092                 DWORD dwPluginMajorVersion,
00093                 DWORD dwPluginMinorVersion,
00094                 DWORD dwPluginType,
00095                 const char* pchDescription,
00096                 const char* pchAbout,
00097                 DWORD dwFreeFrameExtendedDataSize = 0,
00098                 const void* pFreeFrameExtendedDataBlock = NULL
00099         );
00100 
00102         ~CFFPluginInfo();
00103 
00111         const PluginInfoStruct* GetPluginInfo() const;
00112 
00121         const PluginExtendedInfoStruct* GetPluginExtendedInfo() const;
00122 
00127         FPCREATEINSTANCE* GetFactoryMethod() const;
00128 
00129 private:
00130         
00131         // Structures containing information about the plugin
00132         PluginInfoStruct m_PluginInfo;
00133         PluginExtendedInfoStruct m_PluginExtendedInfo;
00134 
00135         // Pointer to the factory method of the plugin subclass
00136         FPCREATEINSTANCE* m_pCreateInstance;
00137 };
00138 
00139 
00140 #endif
